questions.prompt:
The graphs of the polar curves r = 3  and r = 4 −2sinθ are shown in the figure above.  The curves intersect 
when θ = π
6  and θ = 5π
6  .

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt:
Let S be the shaded region that is inside the graph of r = 3 and also inside the graph of r = 4 −2sinθ.  
Find the area of S.

parts.label: (b)
parts.prompt:
A particle moves along the polar curve r = 4 −2sinθ so that at time t seconds, θ = t
2 .  Find the time t 
in the interval 1≤t ≤2 for which the x-coordinate of the particle’s position is −1.

parts.label: (c)
parts.prompt:
For the particle described in part (b), find the position vector in terms of t.  Find the velocity vector at 
time t = 1.5.
